signals.headline: X-Polymarket Partnership Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
X-Polymarket Partnership Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
X has officially partnered with Polymarket to integrate decentralized prediction markets into the social media platform, enabling native visibility of market data in posts and trending topics for real-time probabilities on events like elections or cultural outcomes; details on full implementation remain undisclosed.[2][4]

signals.headline: Andrew Tate Post Bets Scrutinized for Coordinated Whale Activity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Andrew Tate Post Bets Scrutinized for Coordinated Whale Activity | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On-chain analysts identified seven accounts coordinating bets on Andrew Tate's X posting volume, netting ~$52K profit amid low liquidity that amplified price influence, sparking debates on insider trading and transparency in Polymarket.[1]

signals.headline: XRP 15-Minute Whale Exploit Yields $233K | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP 15-Minute Whale Exploit Yields $233K | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trader @a4385 drained liquidity from bots in a low-liquidity Polymarket on XRP price movement, profiting $233K overnight via precise timing just before a 0.5% Binance pump, highlighting short-term market inefficiencies.[3]

China-Taiwan Clash Before 2027 Odds Stable | NO major move | LOW confidence**
